---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r,decontx run}
library(celda)
library(Seurat)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(patchwork)

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 1: Run decontX
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(seurat_obj)

sce <- decontX(
  sce,
  z = seurat_obj$seurat_clusters
)

# Transfer contamination scores back
seurat_obj$decontX_contamination <- sce$decontX_contamination

# Add decontaminated counts as new assay
seurat_obj[["decontX"]] <- CreateAssayObject(counts = round(decontXcounts(sce)))

cat("decontX complete\n")
cat("Median contamination score:", median(seurat_obj$decontX_contamination), "\n")

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 2: Visualize contamination before removal
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# Contamination score on UMAP
p_cont <- FeaturePlot(seurat_obj,
                       features = "decontX_contamination",
                       cols     = c("lightgrey", "red")) +
           ggtitle("DecontX Contamination Score")

# B cell markers before cleaning — using RAW counts
DefaultAssay(seurat_obj) <- "RNA"
p_before <- FeaturePlot(seurat_obj,
                         features = c("MS4A1", "CD79A"),
                         ncol     = 2) &
             ggtitle("Before decontX")

# B cell markers after decontX — using CLEAN counts
DefaultAssay(seurat_obj) <- "decontX"
p_after <- FeaturePlot(seurat_obj,
                        features = c("MS4A1", "CD79A"),
                        ncol     = 2) &
            ggtitle("After decontX")

print(p_cont)
print(p_before / p_after)

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 3: Remove MS4A1+ CD79A+ cells using DECONTAMINATED counts
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# Use decontX assay for cell calling — cleaner signal
DefaultAssay(seurat_obj) <- "decontX"

ms4a1_counts <- GetAssayData(seurat_obj,
                              assay = "decontX",
                              slot  = "counts")["MS4A1", ]

cd79a_counts <- GetAssayData(seurat_obj,
                              assay = "decontX",
                              slot  = "counts")["CD79A", ]

# Flag true B cells: co-expressing both markers
is_bcell <- ms4a1_counts > 0 & cd79a_counts > 0

cat("\nCells flagged as B cells (MS4A1+ CD79A+):", sum(is_bcell), "\n")
cat("Percentage of total: ", round(mean(is_bcell) * 100, 2), "%\n")

# Keep non-B cells
cells_keep <- names(is_bcell)[!is_bcell]
seurat_obj_clean <- subset(seurat_obj, cells = cells_keep)

cat("\nCells before removal:", ncol(seurat_obj),       "\n")
cat("Cells after removal: ", ncol(seurat_obj_clean), "\n")
cat("Total removed:       ", ncol(seurat_obj) - ncol(seurat_obj_clean), "\n")

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 4: Set RNA as default and renormalize
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

DefaultAssay(seurat_obj_clean) <- "RNA"
seurat_obj_clean <- NormalizeData(seurat_obj_clean)
seurat_obj_clean <- FindVariableFeatures(seurat_obj_clean)
seurat_obj_clean <- ScaleData(seurat_obj_clean)

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 5: Confirm B cell markers are gone
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

DefaultAssay(seurat_obj_clean) <- "RNA"

p_final <- FeaturePlot(seurat_obj_clean,
                        features = c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "IGHG1", "CD27"),
                        ncol     = 2) &
            ggtitle("After B cell removal")

p_umap <- DimPlot(seurat_obj_clean,
                   group.by = "seurat_clusters",
                   label    = TRUE) +
           ggtitle("UMAP after B cell removal")

print(p_final)
print(p_umap)

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# STEP 6: Save clean object
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

saveRDS(seurat_obj_clean, "seurat_obj_decontX_Bcell_removed.rds")
cat("Saved: seurat_obj_decontX_Bcell_removed.rds\n")
```
```{r, decontx if merged obj}
# If your object contains multiple samples — run decontX per sample
sample_list <- SplitObject(seurat_obj, split.by = "Patient.Number")

sample_list <- lapply(sample_list, function(s) {

  # decontX per sample
  sce_s <- as.SingleCellExperiment(s)
  sce_s <- decontX(sce_s, z = s$seurat_clusters)
  s$decontX_contamination <- sce_s$decontX_contamination
  s[["decontX"]] <- CreateAssayObject(counts = round(decontXcounts(sce_s)))

  # Remove B cells per sample using decontX counts
  ms4a1 <- GetAssayData(s, assay = "decontX", slot = "counts")["MS4A1", ]
  cd79a <- GetAssayData(s, assay = "decontX", slot = "counts")["CD79A", ]
  keep  <- names(ms4a1)[!(ms4a1 > 0 & cd79a > 0)]

  cat("Sample", unique(s$sample_id),
      "| removed:", ncol(s) - length(keep),
      "| remaining:", length(keep), "\n")

  subset(s, cells = keep)
})

# Re-merge
seurat_obj_clean <- merge(sample_list[[1]], y = sample_list[-1])
cat("Final cell count:", ncol(seurat_obj_clean), "\n")
```
